meaning: n.(有关一个题目或一个人的)书目,参考书目
examples: Listing 2 shows a sample XML document, bib.xml, which represents a bibliography of books.
The Three Rules is a self-conscious contribution to this type of writing; it even includes a bibliography of "success studies".
At the end of this chapter there is a select bibliography of useful books.
"The bibliography of the bank is meagre and leads to nowhere in particular, " Jarvie observed.
Philip Callow has drawn heavily on the vast Stevenson bibliography for this book.
